message:
feat: add safe localStorage wrappers and beginner guides

- Add safeGetItem/safeSetItem/safeGetJSON/safeSetJSON to lib/utils.ts
  - Handle SSR, private browsing, and quota exceeded errors gracefully
- Update analytics.ts to use safe localStorage wrappers
- Update userPreferences.ts with safe wrappers and IP validation
- Update wizardSteps.ts with safe wrappers and step validation
- Add Safari < 14 fallback for useReducedMotion hook
- Enhance install-terminal and os-selection pages with SimplerGuide
  - Beginner-friendly explanations with collapsible "Make it simpler" section
  - Direct download buttons for Mac terminal apps

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
